name: BION ENVIRONMENTAL TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: Bion Environmental Technologies develops and commercializes Gen3Tech, a platform integrating livestock waste treatment with nutrient recovery and renewable energy. Its core product is the Ammonia Recovery System (ARS), which extracts ammonia from animal waste, biogas, and industrial wastewater to produce fertilizer. The company targets sustainable agriculture, clean fuels, and environmental compliance markets, but currently generates no significant revenues and faces severe financial distress.
